---
title: "Services"
---

## Services {icon="heart-pulse"}

We provide practical, coordinated support for people with complex needs.

::: {.service-card}
### Initial Needs Assessment

A clear assessment of current needs, priorities, risks, and support requirements.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Rehabilitation Planning

Coordinating therapy, equipment, care, and community-based support.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Ongoing Case Management

Regular review, liaison, planning, and progress monitoring.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Professional Liaison

Working with solicitors, insurers, therapists, GPs, consultants, and care providers.
:::
